Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.
Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.
Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.
Students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.
Additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

Furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.
Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.
Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

Students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact. Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
